blood-pressure-calculator.title: Калькулятор Давление
blood-pressure-calculator.description: Бесплатный Blood Pressure Calculator — Interpret systolic and diastolic blood pressure readings and understand your cardiovascular health. Get instant classification of your BP according to clinical guidelines with personalized recommendations.

mean-arterial-pressure.title: Калькулятор Давление
mean-arterial-pressure.description: Бесплатный Mean Arterial Pressure Calculator — Calculate MAP from systolic and diastolic blood pressure. Essential for assessing tissue perfusion and cardiovascular function in clinical settings.

pulse-pressure.title: Калькулятор Давление
pulse-pressure.description: Бесплатный Pulse Pressure Calculator — Compute pulse pressure from systolic and diastolic readings. Monitor arterial stiffness and cardiovascular risk with this simple clinical measurement.

cardiac-output.title: Калькулятор Cardiac Output
cardiac-output.description: Бесплатный Cardiac Output Calculator — Estimate cardiac output from heart rate and stroke volume. Assess how well your heart pumps blood to support vital organ function.

stroke-volume.title: Калькулятор Объем
stroke-volume.description: Бесплатный Stroke Volume Calculator — Calculate stroke volume from cardiac output and heart rate. Measure the amount of blood pumped per heartbeat for cardiac assessment.

ejection-fraction.title: Калькулятор Дробь
ejection-fraction.description: Бесплатный Ejection Fraction Calculator — Estimate left ventricular ejection fraction from stroke volume and end-diastolic volume. Critical for diagnosing and monitoring heart failure.

heart-age.title: Калькулятор Сердечный
heart-age.description: Бесплатный Heart Age Calculator — Estimate your heart age based on blood pressure, BMI, smoking status, and other risk factors. Understand your cardiovascular risk compared to your chronological age.

framingham-risk-score.title: Калькулятор Framingham Risk Score
framingham-risk-score.description: Бесплатный Framingham Risk Score Calculator — Estimate 10-year cardiovascular disease risk using the Framingham Heart Study model. Assess coronary heart disease risk for preventive care planning.

ascvd-risk.title: Калькулятор ASCVD Risk
ascvd-risk.description: Бесплатный ASCVD Risk Calculator — Estimate 10-year and lifetime atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease risk using the ACC/AHA pooled cohort equations. Guide statin therapy and prevention decisions.

chads-vasc-score.title: Калькулятор CHADS-VASc Score
chads-vasc-score.description: Бесплатный CHADS-VASc Score Calculator — Assess stroke risk in patients with atrial fibrillation using the CHADS-VASc scoring system. Guide anticoagulation therapy decisions for stroke prevention.

heart-rate-zone.title: Калькулятор Сердечный
heart-rate-zone.description: Бесплатный Heart Rate Zone Calculator — Determine your target heart rate zones for exercise based on age and resting heart rate. Optimize workout intensity for fat burn, cardio, and peak performance.

target-heart-rate.title: Калькулятор Сердечный
target-heart-rate.description: Бесплатный Target Heart Rate Calculator — Calculate your ideal target heart rate for exercise using the Karvonen method. Train at the right intensity for maximum cardiovascular benefits.

waist-to-hip-ratio.title: Калькулятор Коэффициент
waist-to-hip-ratio.description: Бесплатный Waist-to-Hip Ratio Calculator — Measure your waist-to-hip ratio to assess body fat distribution and cardiovascular risk. Simple anthropometric measurement for metabolic health screening.

waist-to-height-ratio.title: Калькулятор Коэффициент
waist-to-height-ratio.description: Бесплатный Waist-to-Height Ratio Calculator — Evaluate your waist-to-height ratio as a predictor of cardiometabolic risk. A simple and effective screening tool for central obesity and health risks.

body-roundness-index.title: Калькулятор Тела
body-roundness-index.description: Бесплатный Body Roundness Index Calculator — Calculate your Body Roundness Index (BRI) from height and waist circumference. A newer anthropometric measure that estimates body fat distribution and health risk.

ponderal-index.title: Калькулятор Ponderal Index
ponderal-index.description: Бесплатный Ponderal Index Calculator — Calculate the Ponderal Index as an alternative to BMI for assessing body mass relative to height. Useful for pediatric and adult body composition assessment.

frame-size.title: Калькулятор Frame Size
frame-size.description: Бесплатный Frame Size Calculator — Determine your body frame size based on wrist circumference and height. Understand your skeletal frame type to set realistic weight and body composition goals.

lean-body-mass.title: Калькулятор Масса
lean-body-mass.description: Бесплатный Lean Body Mass Calculator — Estimate your lean body mass (LBM) using validated formulas. Track muscle mass versus fat mass for fitness progress and body composition analysis.

fat-free-mass-index.title: Калькулятор Масса
fat-free-mass-index.description: Бесплатный Fat-Free Mass Index Calculator — Calculate FFMI as a height-adjusted measure of lean muscle mass. Used by athletes and clinicians to assess nutritional status and muscle development.

skeletal-muscle-mass.title: Калькулятор Масса
skeletal-muscle-mass.description: Бесплатный Skeletal Muscle Mass Calculator — Estimate your skeletal muscle mass using anthropometric measurements. Monitor muscle development and sarcopenia risk for better health outcomes.

body-fat-caliper.title: Калькулятор Тела
body-fat-caliper.description: Бесплатный Body Fat Caliper Calculator — Estimate body fat percentage from skinfold measurements using Jackson-Pollock and other protocols. Track body composition changes with precision caliper readings.

navy-body-fat.title: Калькулятор Тела
navy-body-fat.description: Бесплатный Navy Body Fat Calculator — Calculate body fat percentage using the US Navy circumference method. Military-standard body composition assessment using height, waist, neck, and hip measurements.

vo2-max-estimate.title: Калькулятор VO2 Max Estimate
vo2-max-estimate.description: Бесплатный VO2 Max Estimate Calculator — Estimate your VO2 max without exercise testing using age, gender, and activity level. Assess cardiorespiratory fitness for health and athletic performance.

met-minutes.title: Калькулятор MET Minutes
met-minutes.description: Бесплатный MET Minutes Calculator — Calculate MET-minutes of physical activity per week to meet exercise guidelines. Track your total weekly exercise volume for health and fitness goals.

exercise-heart-rate.title: Калькулятор Сердечный
exercise-heart-rate.description: Бесплатный Exercise Heart Rate Calculator — Find your optimal exercise heart rate range for different workout intensities. Train smarter with personalized heart rate targets for warm-up, aerobic, and anaerobic zones.

recovery-heart-rate.title: Калькулятор Сердечный
recovery-heart-rate.description: Бесплатный Recovery Heart Rate Calculator — Measure your heart rate recovery after exercise as an indicator of cardiovascular fitness. Track how quickly your heart rate returns to baseline after exertion.

heart-rate-variability.title: Калькулятор Сердечный
heart-rate-variability.description: Бесплатный Heart Rate Variability Calculator — Analyze your heart rate variability (HRV) for autonomic nervous system assessment. Monitor stress, recovery, and overall health through HRV metrics.

training-impulse.title: Калькулятор Training Impulse
training-impulse.description: Бесплатный Training Impulse Calculator — Calculate TRIMP (training impulse) to quantify your workout load. Monitor training stress and balance intensity with recovery for optimal performance gains.

fitness-age.title: Калькулятор Возраст
fitness-age.description: Бесплатный Fitness Age Calculator — Estimate your fitness age based on resting heart rate, BMI, and activity habits. Compare your cardiovascular fitness level to population norms for your age group.

physical-activity-level.title: Калькулятор Physical Activity Level
physical-activity-level.description: Бесплатный Physical Activity Level Calculator — Determine your PAL score from your daily activity patterns. Estimate total energy expenditure and calorie needs based on lifestyle and exercise habits.

pal-calculator.title: PAL Calculator (Detailed)
pal-calculator.description: Бесплатный PAL Calculator — Calculate your Physical Activity Level (PAL) with detailed activity logging. Get a precise activity factor for accurate BMR-based daily calorie requirement estimation.

neat-calculator.title: Калькулятор NEAT
neat-calculator.description: Бесплатный NEAT Calculator — Estimate your Non-Exercise Activity Thermogenesis (NEAT) from daily non-exercise movements. Understand how everyday activities contribute to your total daily energy expenditure.
